-0.2063*(0.8317*tanh(0.8674*x_1 - 1.5158) - 0.3198*tanh(1.3227*x_2 - 2.422) + 1)**3 + 0.3637*exp(0.1856*(0.7391 - x_2)**2 + 0.0324*sinh(1.045*x_1 - 0.1716)) + 0.2532*sin(0.0377*(-x_2 - 0.2457)**2 + 1.6809*sin(0.5752*x_1 - 4.4046) - 10.0593) + 0.2218*sinh(0.3651*exp(0.8959*x_2) - 0.181*tanh(1.2771*x_1 - 0.0071) - 0.2308) + 1.0316
